report.summary: UX audited 4 new pages from today's build cycles, created 2 missing OG images, and implemented accessibility/readability fixes across governance security and funding rate arbitrage guides.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: governance-security-attack-vectors-2026: Added BackToTop component for long-page navigation
governance-security-attack-vectors-2026: Fixed breadcrumb consistency — added 'degen0x' root link, removed self-referencing href on current page
governance-security-attack-vectors-2026: Differentiated risk badge colors — CRITICAL (#da3633), HIGH (#f86471), MEDIUM (#f0883e/orange) now visually distinct
governance-security-attack-vectors-2026: Increased case study detail text from 13px to 14px with line-height 1.5 for readability
governance-security-attack-vectors-2026: Increased defense description text from 13px to 14px with line-height 1.5
governance-security-attack-vectors-2026: Fixed defense effectiveness badge from 11px to 12px minimum
governance-security-attack-vectors-2026: Added whiteSpace: nowrap to risk badges to prevent text wrapping on mobile
funding-rate-arbitrage-guide-2026: Added BackToTop component for long-page navigation
funding-rate-arbitrage-guide-2026: Increased risk factor detail text from 13px to 14px for accessibility compliance
lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026: Verified — already has BackToTop, StructuredData, proper breadcrumbs, no sub-14px body text
institutional-crypto-adoption-guide-2026: Verified — already has BackToTop, StructuredData, proper breadcrumbs, no sub-14px body text

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: governance-security-attack-vectors-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme, shield icon, $181M/$28B+/6 defense stats cards, SECURITY+DAO GOVERNANCE badges, gradient accents
OG image: funding-rate-arbitrage-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme, funding rate chart visualization, 3 strategy cards with APY ranges, ADVANCED+PERPETUALS badges, venue list
